optimization_analysis.optimized_query:
# Optimized Federated Query using SERVICE clauses
# Each triple pattern is pushed to its most selective endpoint

# Endpoint: http://localhost:8897/sparql/
# Predicates: 4
#   <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#lat> (http://www.geonames.org/ontology#Feature -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.8K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#lat> (http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Concept -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.8K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#long> (http://www.geonames.org/ontology#Feature -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.8K triples]
#   <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#long> (http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#Concept -> http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#Literal) [1.8K triples]

optimized_federated_query:
# Smart Federated Query with Class Constraints
# Note: Multiple class interpretations exist but all route to same endpoints
# A single query retrieves all data regardless of class ambiguity

SELECT DISTINCT ?author ?capital ?latitude ?longitude ?paper ?place ?proceedings ?role
WHERE {

  SERVICE <http://localhost:8897/sparql/> {
    ?place <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#lat> ?latitude . # ?place:Feature, ?latitude:Literal
    ?place <http://www.w3.org/2003/01/geo/wgs84_pos#long> ?longitude . # ?place:Feature, ?longitude:Literal
    ?author <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/based_near> ?place .
    ?place <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/capital> ?capital .
  }

  # Unknown endpoint (no metadata)
    ?proceedings <http://data.semanticweb.org/ns/swc/ontology#relatedToEvent> <http://data.semanticweb.org/conference/eswc/2010> .
    ?role <http://data.semanticweb.org/ns/swc/ontology#isRoleAt> <http://data.semanticweb.org/conference/eswc/2010> .
    ?role <http://data.semanticweb.org/ns/swc/ontology#heldBy> ?author .
    ?paper <http://swrc.ontoware.org/ontology#author> ?author .
    ?paper <http://data.semanticweb.org/ns/swc/ontology#isPartOf> ?proceedings .
}
LIMIT 1000
